'''√ng-v-h''' ('''kangavah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quantize|quantize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quantize|quantize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √ng-v-h
|-
! Lemma
| kangavah
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thingavah || jingavah || shingavah || kingavah
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthungavah || jujungavah || shushungavah || kukungavah
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thungavah || jungavah || shungavah || kungavah
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thungavah || jungavah || shungavah || kungavah
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thengavah || jengavah || shengavah || kengavah
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothongavah || jojongavah || shoshongavah || kokongavah
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thongavah || jongavah || shongavah || kongavah
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thongavah || jongavah || shongavah || kongavah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ngavah || ngavah || ngavah || ngavah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ngavah || ngavah || ngavah || ngavah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ngavah || ngavah || ngavah || ngavah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ngavah || ngavah || ngavah || ngavah
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thængavah || jængavah || shængavah || kængavah
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathangavah || jajangavah || shashangavah || kakangavah
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thangavah || jangavah || shangavah || kangavah
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thangavah || jangavah || shangavah || kangavah
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shangavah
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshangavah
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishangavah
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shangavahnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshangavahnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishangavahnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shangavahshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshangavahnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishangavahshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shangavahro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshangavahnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishangavahro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shangavahmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshangavahnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishangavahmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shangavahsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshangavahnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishangavahsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shangavahng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshangavahnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishangavahng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shangavahya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshangavahnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishangavahya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shangavahyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshangavahnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishangavahyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shangavahnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshangavahnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishangavahnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shangavahnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangavahnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangavahnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shangavahnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshangavahnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangavahnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shangavahshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshangavahnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishangavahshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shangavahshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangavahnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangavahshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shangavahshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshangavahnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangavahshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shangavahronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshangavahnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishangavahronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shangavahroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshangavahnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishangavahroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shangavahromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshangavahnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangavahromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shangavahmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshangavahnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishangavahmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shangavahmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshangavahnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishangavahmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shangavahmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangavahnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangavahmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
